message:
fix(node): bound unbounded Vec pushes in cancellable_task and redteam_evaluations

- cancellable_task: register_child() pushed to child_task_ids without cap → push_bounded with MAX_CHILD_TASKS=1024
- redteam_evaluations: add_finding() pushed to findings without cap → push_bounded with MAX_FINDINGS_PER_ENGAGEMENT=4096

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
